passage: Every morning, Maya walked the same path through the neighborhood park on her way to school. She noticed the groundskeeping crew arrive at 7:00 a.m. sharp, always beginning with the same routine: first raking the gravel paths, then trimming the hedges along the fence, and finally collecting any litter near the benches. One Tuesday, Maya arrived at the park at 7:45 a.m. and found the paths already raked and the hedges neatly trimmed. The crew's truck was still parked near the entrance, and one worker was filling a large garbage bag near the bench area. Maya quickened her pace, knowing she only had fifteen minutes to reach school before the first bell.
stem: Based on the passage, what can most reasonably be inferred about the groundskeeping crew when Maya passes through the park on Tuesday?

choices.label: A
choices.text: The crew arrived earlier than usual that morning.

choices.label: B
choices.text: The crew is nearly finished with its daily routine.

choices.label: C
choices.text: The crew has added new tasks to its regular schedule.

choices.label: D
choices.text: The crew is short-staffed and working more slowly.

explanation: The passage describes the crew's routine in order: raking gravel paths, then trimming hedges, then collecting litter. When Maya arrives at 7:45 a.m., the paths are already raked and the hedges are already trimmed, and one worker is filling a garbage bag near the benches—which is the final step. This sequence of completed and in-progress tasks directly supports the inference that the crew is nearly done with its routine.

distractorRationale.A: The passage does not indicate the crew arrived earlier than 7:00 a.m. Maya's later arrival time (7:45 vs. her usual time) explains why more tasks are completed, not an earlier crew arrival.
distractorRationale.C: No new tasks are mentioned. The worker collecting litter near the benches is the final step of the established routine, not an additional task.
distractorRationale.D: Nothing in the passage suggests understaffing or slower work. The crew appears to be progressing through its routine at a normal pace.
